title: Trader Horn
writer: Ethelreda Lewis, Dale Van Every, John T. Neville
actors: Harry Carey, Edwina Booth, Duncan Renaldo
plot: Two white traders in the darkest Africa of the 1870s find a missionary's daughter, who was captured as a child by a savage tribe and now worshiped as a goddess.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 1 nomination total
